name: Abitibi Royalties, Inc.
description: Abitibi Royalties Inc. is a Canadian-based company focused on building a royalty portfolio through the acquisition of mineral royalties and the exploration, evaluation, and development of mineral properties. Initially spun out of Golden Valley Mines and listed as a public company in 2011, the firm specializes in generating value from its assets, with a significant strategic focus on the Canadian Malartic mine. By leveraging its expertise in mineral property evaluation and project promotion, Abitibi Royalties aims to provide shareholders with exposure to precious metals production while maintaining a lean operational structure within the mining sector.
